display_name: Orchid v1.5 — Additive Units (U8 + U9 + Tier Propagation)
isolation_opt_out_reason: Retroactive feature dir creation 2026-05-23 closing D-AUDIT-9 from comprehensive PR↔docs sync audit. Feature work (Tracks L + D) shipped 2026-05-03 via PRs #179 (spec), #180 (plan), #182 (Track L Layer A behavioral models), #183 (Track D D1+D2 tier-aware DSE), #184 (toolchain setup guide + case study scaffold). Track R RTL Phases 6-9 are BLOCKED on v1 SoC integration (Phase 5) which itself requires the v1 toolchain to land; per project memory paused-at-Track-L+D-complete. Case study at status=draft_for_review with sections 4-5 unfilled pending Track R completion. This state.json is a retroactive ledger entry, not a new working tree.

paused.reason: Track R Layer B Chisel RTL Phases 6-9 blocked on v1 SoC integration (Phase 5). Phase 5 doesn't exist yet — needs the Orchid v1 toolchain (per docs/setup/orchid-toolchain-setup.md) AND v1 Phase 2-5 plans to execute first. This is EXPECTED per the v1.5 plan §Risks item 1 — the whole point of Option B (v1.5 incremental) was that Track R doesn't block on the v1.5 spec/Layer A work.
paused.resume_signal: Orchid v1 toolchain setup complete AND v1 Phase 5 SoC integration green; case study §3.3 Track R checklist becomes actionable.

snapshot.next_action_when_resumed: Run Track D D3 (26K-run DSE sweep) → fill case study §4 with results → start Track R Phases 6-9 RTL once v1 Phase 5 lands → fill case study §5 architecture validation.
blockers: v1 SoC integration Phase 5 not started
Orchid v1 toolchain (Chisel/FIRRTL/Yosys/OpenROAD) not installed locally
